AI Blog Post

This is a blog post that only has a publish date in the meta article:published_time tag. There is no JSON-LD structured data on this page and no time element with a datetime attribute. The only structured date signal available is in the meta property tag in the document head.

This tests the second tier of our date extraction precedence chain: when JSON-LD is absent we should fall back to meta tags before falling back to time elements or returning null.
